title: Accounting for workdays in my formula
excerpt: I am trying to alter my formula to account for workdays. Here is my current formula: FORMAT_DATE(SUBTRACT_DAYS({Master Due Date},{+/- Days})). The formula builder ai was not helpful.

posts.author: LAdetunji (Lawrence Adetunji)
posts.cookedHtml: I am trying to alter my formula to account for workdays. Here is my current formula: FORMAT_DATE(SUBTRACT_DAYS({Master Due Date},{+/- Days})). The formula builder ai was not helpful.
